applicability_notes: Unary zero-comparison op: returns elementwise (x >= 0) as 1.0/0.0 mask. Golden: lambda x: torch.ge(x, 0); test golden uses 'in_data >= 0'. Also matches torch.ge(x, torch.zeros_like(x)) and (x >= 0).to(dtype) patterns. Fuses as a chain replacement for a single comparison-with-zero op; no weights.
